short: A framing of AI that supports human judgment rather than replacing it.
definition: Augmented intelligence is a framing of AI that emphasizes supporting human work instead of automating it away. The same underlying technology as other AI is used, but the design keeps a person in control while the system handles suggestions, analysis, or drafting. This human-in-the-loop framing is common in healthcare, legal, and financial settings where human oversight and accountability are essential.
